About

Meet the creator.

I’m Muhammad Bobby Bangsawan — a creative storyteller, AI visual director, and digital entrepreneur from Indonesia. I specialize in crafting cinematic AI-generated content that blends emotion, culture, mythology, and modern visual aesthetics into immersive storytelling experiences.

My work spans AI filmmaking, cinematic prompt engineering, branded visual concepts, and social-first content creation — from historical dramas and folklore-inspired narratives to stylized music videos and surreal visual campaigns.

I’m also a Creative Partner Program (CPP) creator for multiple AI platforms including Higgsfield, Kling, FloraFauna AI, Dreamina, Invideo, OpenArt, ImagineArt, Pollo AI, YouArt, Hailuo, Hedra, and Wavespeed.
